updates.content:
Title: Intune admins may intermittently be unable to complete actions that require Multi Admin Approval

User impact: Intune admins may intermittently be unable to complete actions that require Multi Admin Approval.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with completing actions that require Multi Admin Approval and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Intune admins may intermittently be unable to complete actions that require Multi Admin Approval

User impact: Intune admins may intermittently be unable to complete actions that require Multi Admin Approval.

Final status: The investigation is complete and we've determined the service is healthy. A service incident didn't actually occur. This communication will expire in 24 hours.

This is the final update for the event.
